summary: Tested Challenge Mode, Watermarking Performance, Check-In Post Styling, Debug Overlay, and Map Pulse features. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Fixed 2 API bugs (posts and live-photographers endpoints returning 500). All new feature code verified in frontend.
critical_code_review_comments: Challenge Mode APIs (GET /api/challenges/current, /history, /photographer/{id}/stats) all working correctly
Watermark test endpoint (POST /api/uploads/test-watermark) working with performance timing
Check-In post styling implemented: border-l-4 border-l-cyan-500 and gradient 'Jumped In' banner
Debug overlay with data-testid='debug-toggle' and data-testid='debug-overlay' implemented
Debug overlay shows GPS accuracy in meters, camera status, and permission flow steps
Sequential permission flow: Location → Spot Picker → Camera implemented via startSequentialGoLive()
MapPage subscribes to Supabase Realtime for live_session_participants table via supabase.channel()
Electric Cyan (#00CCFF) pulse animation on map pins when surfer joins session
Fixed: Posts API was returning 500 due to null media_url - now skips invalid posts
Fixed: Live photographers API was returning 500 due to null is_streaming - now defaults to false

success_rate.frontend: Code verified - all features implemented correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Challenge Mode fully implemented with WeeklyChallenge auto-creation. Watermark performance test endpoint at POST /api/uploads/test-watermark. Check-In posts now have cyan left border and 'Jumped In' banner when is_check_in=true. Debug overlay on PhotographerSessionsManager shows GPS accuracy, camera status, and permission flow. Map page uses Supabase Realtime to detect new surfers joining live sessions and pulses map pins with Electric Cyan. Fixed API bugs where posts with null media_url and live photographers with null is_streaming caused 500 errors.

backend: GET /api/challenges/photographer/invalid-id/stats - Returns zero stats for unknown ID (PASSED)
POST /api/uploads/test-watermark - Tests watermark performance with small image (PASSED)
POST /api/uploads/test-watermark - Tests watermark performance with medium image (PASSED)
GET /api/surf-spots - Returns spots for spot picker (PASSED)
GET /api/live-photographers - Returns live photographers (PASSED after fix)
Active session API supports debug overlay (PASSED)
frontend_code_verified: Feed.js: Check-In posts have border-l-4 border-l-cyan-500 class
Feed.js: 'Jumped In' banner with gradient background for check-in posts
PhotographerSessionsManager.js: Debug toggle button with data-testid='debug-toggle'
PhotographerSessionsManager.js: Debug overlay shows GPS accuracy in meters
PhotographerSessionsManager.js: Debug overlay shows camera status
PhotographerSessionsManager.js: Sequential permission flow (location → spot_picker → camera → ready)
MapPage.js: Supabase Realtime subscription for live_session_participants table
MapPage.js: Electric Cyan (#00CCFF) pulse effect on photographer markers
MapPage.js: pulsingMarkers state tracks which markers should animate

bugs_fixed.issue: Posts with media_url=None caused validation error returning 500
bugs_fixed.fix: Added check to skip posts without media_url in get_feed()

bugs_fixed.issue: Photographers with is_streaming=None caused validation error returning 500
bugs_fixed.fix: Added default value False for is_shooting and is_streaming in LivePhotographerResponse and mapping
